title: astracantha lateritians
intro: Astracantha lateritians, also known as French broom or Spanish broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Astracantha lateritians include reducing inflammation, relieving arthritis symptoms, and supporting urinary tract health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
